name: Race Condition During Access to Alternate Channel
description: The product opens an alternate channel for an authorized user but makes it accessible to other actors during a timing window, creating a race condition that allows an attacker to access the channel before the legitimate user and gain unauthorized privileges.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL node creating or opening an alternate communication channel (named pipe, temporary socket, shared resource) intended for a specific AUTH-validated user, where a timing gap exists between channel creation and AUTH binding, allowing a concurrent INGRESS from an unauthorized actor to claim the channel first
